metadata.description: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap), mtls (server-trusts-client mTLS), lxd-claude-setup (headless Claude Code setup on LXD/Linux), and a bare-metal Kubernetes family — k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Rancher, single-node/HA/join), harbor-registry (private Harbor with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted Actions runners).

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description: Bundled PKI + ops + bare-metal Kubernetes skills, with /k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup commands. Battle-tested runbooks with frontmatter triggers so Claude Code can auto-activate them.
